extraction.one_line_summary: BILBAO Pello soloed to victory from a 25-rider breakaway on final climb after YATES Adam's acceleration split favorites but couldn't bridge.
tactical_patterns: AG2R deployed dual tactic: BARDET Romain drilled peloton on Col de Prey, then released LATOUR Pierre ahead into break.
BILBAO Pello held 21 seconds over chasers despite YATES Adam pulling THOMAS Geraint and MARTIN Dan halfway up final climb.
Sky's pursuit after LATOUR Pierre regained breakaway proved insufficient; 25-rider break too strong to eliminate on final ascent.

rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: recovered from empty Giro-induced bad day to finish second, conducted teammates wisely before attacking final kilometer
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: negative: distanced when AG2R raised tempo on Col de Prey, unable to stay with favorites group
rider_signals.MOSCON Gianni: negative: dropped when peloton fractured under AG2R pressure on Col de Prey
rider_signals.JUNGELS Bob: negative: shed from favorites group during AG2R acceleration on Col de Prey
rider_signals.BARDET Romain: positive: set crippling rhythm on Col de Prey fracturing peloton, then attacked after summit though unsuccessful
rider_signals.LATOUR Pierre: positive: bridged from peloton after Col de Prey summit back to 25-rider breakaway, AG2R tactical asset
rider_signals.YATES Adam: positive: only rider to meaningfully accelerate halfway up final climb, pulled elite group chasing BILBAO
rider_signals.MARTIN Dan: positive: followed YATES Adam's acceleration into chase group, finished third day after stage win
